creator: ports@nicandneal.net
text: Just one more point of information: this is now at the last commit before a new dependency is introduced for multimethod. This does not currently have a port from what I can see, so it would mean writing yet another one. Once this pr has been committed I will look into it, depending on how close things are to an official release. The project doesn't seem to worry too much about releases though and always recommend to use the latest code.
